classes.name: ekuiper.function.Function

methods.name: ekuiper.function.Function.validate
documentation: callback to validate against ast args, return a string error or empty string

methods.name: ekuiper.function.Function.exec
documentation: callback to do execution, return result

methods.name: ekuiper.function.Function.is_aggregate
documentation: callback to check if function is for aggregation, return bool
abstract class for eKuiper function plugin

classes.name: ekuiper.sink.Sink

methods.name: ekuiper.sink.Sink.configure
documentation: configure with conf map and raise error if any

methods.name: ekuiper.sink.Sink.open
documentation: open connection and wait to receive data

methods.name: ekuiper.sink.Sink.collect
documentation: callback to deal with received data

methods.name: ekuiper.sink.Sink.close
documentation: stop running and clean up
abstract class for eKuiper sink plugin

classes.name: ekuiper.source.Source

methods.name: ekuiper.source.Source.configure
documentation: configure with the string datasource and conf map and raise error if any

methods.name: ekuiper.source.Source.open
documentation: run continuously and send out the data or error with ctx

methods.name: ekuiper.source.Source.close
documentation: stop running and clean up
abstract class for eKuiper source plugin

modules.name: ekuiper.runtime.context
documentation:
context.py: Context defines context information available during
# processing of a request.

classes.name: ekuiper.runtime.context.Context

methods.name: ekuiper.runtime.context.Context.get_rule_id
documentation: Return the ruleId of the current stream processing graph

methods.name: ekuiper.runtime.context.Context.get_op_id
documentation: Return the operation id

methods.name: ekuiper.runtime.context.Context.get_instance_id
documentation: Return the instance id

methods.name: ekuiper.runtime.context.Context.get_logger
documentation: Returns the logger object that can be used to do logging

methods.name: ekuiper.runtime.context.Context.emit
documentation: Emit the tuple to the stream

methods.name: ekuiper.runtime.context.Context.emit_error
documentation: Emit error to the stream

methods.name: ekuiper.runtime.context.Context.ack_ok
documentation: Emit the response ack ok to the sink

methods.name: ekuiper.runtime.context.Context.ack_error
documentation: Emit the response ack error to the sink
Interface defining information available at process time
